LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GETAROUND, INC., KELSEY CAMBRIDGE'S MOTION TO STAY CIVIL PROCEEDING OR ALTERNATIVELY MOTION TO STAY DISCOVERY AS TO HER PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE CRIMINAL ACTION AGAINST HER ARISING OUT OF THE SUBJECT ACCIDENT: DEFENDANT KELSEY CAMBRIDGE'S MOTIONS TO STAY DISCOVERY ARE GRANTED IN PART. NO DISCOVERY MAY BE PROPOUNDED ON CAMBRIDGE UNTIL JANUARY 1, 2021; DISCOVERY MAY OTHERWISE PROCEED. (PACERS, INC. V. SUP. CT. (1984) 162 CAL.APP.3D 686, 690 ("PROTECTING A PARTY'S CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT IS PARAMOUNT").) THE CASE WAS FILED IN OCTOBER 2019; NO TRIAL DATE HAS BEEN SET. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU) **CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE # CGC-19-579835**

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Stay Civil Proceeding Or Alternatively Motion To Stay Discovery As To Her Pending Resolution Of The Criminal Action Against Her Arising Out Of The Subject Accident
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs GETAROUND, INC., KELSEY CAMBRIDGE's Motion To Stay Civil Proceeding Or Alternatively Motion To Stay Discovery As To Her Pending Resolution Of The Criminal Action Against Her Arising Out Of The Subject Accident:

Defendant Kelsey Cambridge's motions to stay discovery are granted in part. No discovery may be propounded on Cambridge until January 1, 2021; discovery may otherwise proceed. (Pacers, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (1984) 162 Cal.App.3d 686, 690 ("protecting a party's constitutional right is paramount").) The case was filed in October 2019; no trial date has been set.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

**consolidated with case # CGC-19-579835**
